title: Vanilla Style - Mo' Creatures
description: Mo' Creatures Extended in a Vanilla Style
body:
[Mo' Creatures Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-creatures-extended) in Vanilla Style

Port from Mo'Creatures 16x by [crazyspacekid](https://www.curseforge.com/members/crazyspacekid/projects) to works with Mo' Creatures Extended
